prompt:
Modern minimalist 1:1 hyper-realistic lifestyle photograph. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Clean scandi-modern aesthetic with generous whitespace.

SCENE: a clean serene yoga / meditation corner, warm light-oak wood floor, minimalist style. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label fully legible) sits OFF-CENTER on the wood floor in the right third of the frame. Just two intentional props nearby: a single neatly rolled sage-green yoga mat behind the jar at a clean parallel angle, and a single small ceramic cup. NOTHING ELSE — no clutter, no extra items.

LIGHTING: bright clean natural daylight from tall windows (out-of-frame upper-left), washing the scene cleanly. Soft warm tone reflects subtly from the wood. Neutral soft shadow behind the jar. Specular highlight on the jar's curved glossy black plastic.

FRAMING: clean modern editorial composition — the jar off-center, intentional negative space, balanced minimalist arrangement. Slight elevated 3/4 angle from a comfortable standing height.

BACKGROUND: out-of-focus serene minimalist studio — soft cream walls, just a hint of warm-wood floor extending into soft-focus, no extra furniture or plants in this version. Shallow depth-of-field. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

STYLE: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.8 shallow depth, simple modern clean composition. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
